remarks: Welcome to 143 Hoyt Street, Unit 4K, a spacious and beautifully updated condominium offering 1,315 square feet of comfortable living space in downtown Stamford. This oversized 1BR residence features an additional room, ideal for a home office, or 2nd bedroom. The bright, open-concept kitchen was fully renovated in 2025 and features white shaker cabinetry, quartz countertops, a wine refrigerator, and a breakfast bar, perfect for everyday living and entertaining. The spacious living and dining area is filled with natural light and opens to a private balcony overlooking the pool, an ideal spot to enjoy your morning coffee or unwind with a good book. The large primary bedroom has tons of storage with both a walk-in closet and an additional wall-length closet. An updated bathroom, in-unit washer/dryer, and abundant storage throughout complete this move-in-ready home. Additional highlights include an assigned garage parking space and a private storage unit. Residents of The Buckingham enjoy exceptional amenities, including a 24-hour doorman, fitness center, heated in-ground pool, terrace, guest parking, library, and community room. Just steps from downtown Stamford's vibrant restaurants, shopping, nightlife, and train station, this home offers the perfect combination of convenience and lifestyle. Assessment paid in full by seller! Don't miss this exceptional opportunity - schedule your private showing today!
